projectDescription: A browser-based workbench for turning SVG designs into 3D medal, badge, and metal plate models with GLB export.
keyFeatures: Upload or drag-and-drop SVG files to instantly generate layered 3D models
Per-shape controls for thickness, bevel, material, color, precision, and z-offset
Six built-in material presets: Brushed Gold, Aged Silver, Blackened Steel, Warm Copper, White Ceramic, and Matte Polymer
Dome deformation effect to give medals a spherical curvature
Multi-select layers with Cmd/Ctrl-click, Shift-click range, Cmd/Ctrl+A select-all, and Esc to clear
Export 3D models as GLB files or save work as portable JSON documents
Auto-save with IndexedDB local storage and full work document history
Copy embeddable React/Three.js code snippet for integrating the model in other apps
Interactive infinite canvas home screen with live 3D previews
Import/export entire workspace as a ZIP archive
publicApiSurface: buildMedalGroup(svgText, settings, highlightedPathIndex?) — builds a THREE.Group from SVG + MedalSettings
disposeObject3D(object) — recursively disposes Three.js geometries and materials
exportMedalGlb(svgText, settings) — returns a GLB Blob for download
downloadBlob(blob, filename) — triggers a file download in the browser
createCodeSnippet(svgText, settings) — generates an embeddable React/Three.js snippet
MATERIAL_PRESETS — array of MaterialPreset objects (id, name, color, metalness, roughness, previewSrc)
getMaterialPreset(id) — look up a material preset by id
resolveShapeSettings(settings, pathIndex, summary?) — merges defaults + per-shape patches
saveWorkDocument(document) — persists a WorkDocument to IndexedDB
getWorkDocument(id) — retrieves a WorkDocument from IndexedDB
listSavedWorks() — returns SavedWorkSummary[] sorted by updatedAt
deleteWorkDocument(id) — removes a work from IndexedDB
createWorkDocument(input) — creates a new WorkDocumentV1 object
WorkDocumentV1 — schema for the portable JSON work format (kind: com.medal-forge.work)
